title: NJDOT crashes under-reported 2013-2018
body: Route 445 (Palisades Interstate Parkway) runs along Alpine's eastern border, and crashes on it are typically assigned to Alpine municipality. From 2013-2018, the Palisades Interstate Parkway Police Department stopped filing crash reports with NJDOT — Route 445 crashes dropped from 134/year in 2012 to 1/year during 2013-2018, then returned to 230/year from 2019. This means Alpine's NJDOT crash counts for 2013-2018 under-report actual crashes by roughly 75%. NJSP fatal-crash data is not affected.

title: 2020 Monmouth County homicides likely under-reported
body: The NJ Uniform Crime Report shows only 1 murder in Monmouth County for 2020, down from 10 in 2019 and recovering to 4 in 2021. Statewide homicides actually increased in 2020 (262 to 329). The sharp drop almost certainly reflects incomplete agency reporting during 2020 (COVID-era disruptions and the nationwide UCR-to-NIBRS transition), not an actual decline in homicides.
